---
title: akuzo env
---

# Commands

| Name | Description |
| - | - |
| akuzo env liste | List environments |
| akuzo env set | Set the default environment of the CLI context |

# akuzo env list
List all environments of the current user with the following command:

```bash
akuzo env list
```

# akuzo env set
Set the current environment of the CLI context with the following command:

```bash
akuzo env set   --id
```

## Parameters
`--id` (required): The id of the environment.
